mapper.select: select * from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock where nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock_id = #{value}

select * from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock where nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock_id in
#{nxDistributerGoodsShelfStockId}
mapper.select: select * from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock where nx_dgss_nx_shelf_goods_id = #{shelfGoodsId} and CAST(nx_dgss_rest_weight AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 0 and nx_dgss_status = 0 order by COALESCE(nx_dgss_produce_date, nx_dgss_date) asc, nx_dgss_date asc
